mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 8.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or UNRATE fails to correlate with 5d returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) signal stagflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 260 and FEDFUNDS < 1.0%, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) and employment growth (PAYEMS) indicate robust demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of cases where HOUST and PAYEMS both exceed 1500k and 140k respectively, or the interaction term's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects strong supply-side capacity utilization, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO rises by > 1.0% month-over-month, or the series loses predictive power (IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 260 (CPIAUCSL) signals central bank inaction, eroding real returns and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 260, or the series fails to correlate with 60d returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real sales (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates strong demand fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of cases where RSAFS and GDPC1 both rise by > 1.0% quarter-over-quarter, or the interaction term's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 5.0% signals tight labor markets, increasing wage pressures and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE < 5.0%, or the series fails to correlate with 20d returns (Pearson r < 0.1).
